title: polygala vulgaris lusus depressa
intro: Polygala vulgaris lusus depressa, also known as common polygala, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the milkwort family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of common polygala include its potential to support respiratory health, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Common polygala can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or extract, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
